message:
feat(conformance,linalg): add P2C-002 evidence/perf/raptorq test suites and expand benchmark coverage

- evidence_p2c002.rs: FSCI-P2C-002 evidence bundle generation with forensic logging
- perf_linalg.rs: performance profiling harness for linalg operations across matrix sizes
- raptorq_proofs.rs: RaptorQ sidecar validation with deterministic decode proofs
- linalg_bench.rs: expand from 2 to 7 benchmark groups (solve, solve_triangular, solve_banded, inv, det, lstsq, pinv) across 4 matrix sizes
- lib.rs: export generate_raptorq_sidecar and chunk_payload for test reuse
- e2e_linalg.rs: remove unused imports (blake3_hash, Path, SystemTime) and dead helper
- adversarial_corpus.rs, differential_linalg.rs: rustfmt formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
